units.title: Business units
units.suspend_confirm: The unit won't be able to operate or issue certificates while suspended. Its treasury remains intact. Confirm?
units.suspended_notice: This unit is suspended. It cannot operate or issue certificates.
units.treasury_pending: No treasury yet: it will be created on-chain once the program exists.
units.pending_notice: Unit pending on-chain: it has no treasury yet, so it cannot issue certificates.
units.treasury_pending_notice: The unit will be created with its administrator. Its treasury (Treasury PDA) is created on-chain and stays pending until then: it will not be able to certify.

onchain.step_create_unit: Creating the unit and its management sub-role

privileges_page.title: Privilege catalog
privileges_page.deprecate_impact: This privilege is in {{n}} sub-roles. Once deprecated it can no longer be assigned; existing sub-roles keep it until edited.

users.title: Users and memberships
users.deactivate_confirm: {{name}} won't be able to sign in. The action is audited. Confirm?
users.reset_password_confirm: A password recovery email will be sent to {{name}}. Confirm?

params.title: System parameters
params.saved: Parameters saved. The change is versioned.
params.section_thresholds: Thresholds per crop (provisional, to calibrate in the field)

simulator.title: IoT simulator
simulator.generated_ok: Readings generated within thresholds: the plot is compliant.
simulator.generated_alert: Readings out of range: the plot moves to alert and the farmer is notified.
simulator.disclaimer: Warning: telemetry generated here becomes real certification evidence. This is not a test toy — each reading feeds into the conformity calculation and the certificate. Use only in development or controlled trials.

certificates.title: Global revocation
certificates.empty: There are no certificates on the platform.

finances.title: Platform finances
finances.gas_low: Gas fund low: top up SOL or certification will stop signing.
finances.no_chain: Solana not configured — no on-chain data
